properties.name: jeap.security.oauth2.current-user-endpoint.enabled
properties.description: Whether to expose the jEAP current-user endpoint, which returns information about the currently authenticated user.

properties.name: jeap.security.oauth2.resourceserver.log.authentication-failure.enabled
properties.description: Whether to register an authentication entry point that logs failed authentication attempts (invalid or missing bearer tokens) on the resource server.

properties.name: jeap.security.oauth2.resourceserver.log.access-denied.enabled
properties.description: Whether to register an access denied handler that logs authorization failures (authenticated but not permitted) on the resource server.

properties.name: jeap.security.oauth2.resourceserver.log.access-denied.debug
properties.description: Whether the access denied handler logs additional debug information about the denied request. Only effective when jeap.security.oauth2.resourceserver.log.access-denied.enabled is true.

properties.name: jeap.security.oauth2.resourceserver.log-user-access
properties.description: Whether to register a servlet filter that logs each authenticated user's access to the resource server.
